news.title: ASX falls as Iran tensions escalate; Energy stocks rise, Southern Cross slumps
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket declined on Thursday as fresh US strikes on Iran cast doubt on the chances of a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Exxon CEO Lee Raymond, the ‘Darth Vader of global warming’, dies at 87
news.snippet: The former head of Exxon Mobil oversaw the oil industry’s biggest corporate merger and brandished hostility towards climate-change activism.

news.title: Norfolk bets US$55M in blockbuster Chilean copper reset
news.snippet: Norfolk Metals is set to buy Chile’s permitted Ciclón copper project in a US$55M ($69M) deal, backed by a raising of up to $120M and planned resource-growth drilling.

news.title: Beetaloo fires up seismic as NT pilot gas production nears
news.snippet: Beetaloo Energy is revving up in the NT, with Carpentaria-5H flow testing due this month and a 230km seismic campaign aimed at unlocking a massive 20Tcf gas prize.

news.title: Forrestania lifts Lady Lyla grade in WA gold resource jump
news.snippet: Forrestania has boosted its Lady Lyla gold deposit with a 37% grade lift to 1.41 g/t, adding 41,700 ounces to the company’s growing million-ounce WA global gold inventory.

news.title: Larvotto launches $54M Hammer bid for bolt-on Qld copper
news.snippet: Larvotto Resources has launched a $55M all-scrip bid for Hammer Metals, in a move to bolt on the huge Mt Isa copper portfolio, backed by a $15M placement from major Glencore.

news.title: Kaylee McKeown a victim of her own brilliance as three-year wait goes on
Live: Jai Arrow given emotional guard of honour, Rabbitohs belting Broncos
Augustus wraps up drilling at emerging WA gold discovery
news.snippet: Augustus Minerals has wrapped up a 1650m RC drill program at its Music Well gold project in WA. Assays are pending, with near-term sample re-split results also due from its maiden campaign.

news.title: We get distracted 275 times a day. Use three ways to stay focused
news.snippet: Even when there’s no one else around, we are bombarded with constant virtual pings from new messages and emails all day long.

news.title: Casey McLean's Origin arrival is proof the future has come
Knicks pull off Madison Square Garden miracle in NBA Finals
